budget-deficit.fix_summary: INSEE primary unavailable via pynsee/DBnomics for 2023+; pynsee CNA-2014-DETTE-APU IDBANK 010562129 only through 2022. INSEE Melodi DD_FIPU not exposed. Eurostat gov_10dd_edpt1 mirrors official MIP figure and matches TE value exactly. Leaving source=eurostat as source-label gap; data is correct.
budget-deficit.flag: source-mismatch: TE labels INSEE; pynsee BDM Maastricht deficit series stale (2022 last). Need direct INSEE Melodi DD_FIPU endpoint (not currently exposed via public Melodi REST). Tried: pynsee CNA-2014-DETTE-APU (010562129), pynsee CNA-2010-DETTE-APU, DBnomics INSEE/CNA-2014-DETTE-APU mirror, INSEE Melodi /data/DD_FIPU, INSEE BDM serie lookup — 5 variants, none current.

business-confidence.fix_summary: Already conform. INSEE Climat des Affaires Industrie A10-CZ CVS.

capacity-utilization.fix_summary: Already conform via BdF DBnomics gateway. TE April value matches our March (latest BdF publication; TE pre-emptively labels April after release).

changes-in-inventories.fix_summary: Already conform. INSEE CNT-2020 P52 SO V at 0.148 Bil EUR = 148 EUR Mil exactly matches TE.

consumer-spending.fix_summary: Source label matches (INSEE). Value mismatch: TE shows 345945 EUR Mil chained-volume 2014-base; our V (current price) = 390447 EUR Mil; L (chained 2020-base) = 330320 EUR Mil. Neither INSEE CNT-2020 series matches TE's 345945 exactly — TE likely still uses CNT-2014-PIB-EQB-RF base (legacy).
consumer-spending.flag: value-mismatch (base-year-rebase): TE uses CNT-2014 chained-volume; we use CNT-2020 V. Acceptable for now since TE may not have refreshed to 2020 base. Could later migrate to CNT-2014-PIB-EQB-RF:S14 P3 L if exact-match required.

core-cpi.fix_summary: Already conform. INSEE inflation sous-jacente PRIX_CONSO=4022 base 2025. YoY 103.37/102.1 ≈ +1.24% matches TE 1.20%.

corporate-tax-rate.fix_summary: Curated is acceptable proxy for DGFiP tax rates (no API). Label matches in source-label intent (statutory rate).

corruption-index.fix_summary: Already conform via curated TI CPI.

cpi-clothing.fix_summary: TE page exists but has no description/headline value rendered (sub-CPI pages frequently stub-only on TE). Source-label assumed INSEE per FR.yaml and parent COICOP family. Our INSEE COICOP 03 series is correct.
cpi-clothing.flag: te-page-stub: TE page returns 200 but no description/value block. Cannot verify exact value match. Source-label assumed correct from FR.yaml.

cpi-education.fix_summary: Same as cpi-clothing — TE page stub.

cpi-food.fix_summary: Switched from Eurostat ei_cphi_m:CP-HI01 → INSEE IPC-2025 COICOP01 (IDBANK 011814667). 363 INSEE points upserted; eurostat datapoints deleted. Source now matches TE label INSEE.

cpi-housing-utilities.fix_summary: Already conform. INSEE IPC-2025 COICOP 04 base 2025. Our latest March (101.15) matches INSEE published; TE shows April pre-release 101.60 not yet in pynsee BDM (vintage lag).

cpi-transportation.fix_summary: Already conform. INSEE IPC-2025 COICOP 07. Our latest March (104.09) matches INSEE published; TE shows April 108.46 not yet in pynsee BDM (vintage lag).

credit-rating.fix_summary: Curated TE-aligned numeric proxy of agency ratings.

current-account.fix_summary: Switched from Eurostat bop_c6_q quarterly → BdF BPM6 monthly seasonally-adjusted (DBnomics gateway). 159 monthly BDF points upserted, eurostat datapoints removed. Exact match: -1.175 Bil EUR Mar 2026 = TE -1175 EUR Mil.

current-account-to-gdp.fix_summary: Previously had indicator_sources row but zero data_points (broken fetch). Re-fetched Eurostat bop_gdp6_q PC_GDP CA WRL_REST NSA annual — 27 points upserted. Value -0.3 for 2025 matches TE (deficit of 0.30% of GDP).

disposable-personal-income.fix_summary: Already conform. INSEE CNT-2020-CSI B6 S14. 25-EUR-Mil rounding diff from TE vintage; effectively exact.

employed-persons.fix_summary: Source-label matches TE (Eurostat). Value differs: our default uses lfsi_emp_a annual Y20-64 SA (29288); TE 28177 Q4 2025 closest to lfsi_emp_q Y20-64 NSA THS_PER (28044). Tried 5 dim combos (Y15-64/Y20-64 × NSA/SA/SCA × THS_PER/PC × _q/_a) — none exact-match 28177. TE may use an internal weighted mix.
employed-persons.flag: value-mismatch: Eurostat lfsi_emp_a Y20-64 NSA = 28125 (2025) closer to TE 28177 than current Y20-64 SA 29288. Consider switching default to NSA Y20-64 quarterly lfsi_emp_q which has 28044 Q4 2025 — still ~0.5% off TE.

employment-rate.fix_summary: Source-label matches (INSEE) but our frequency wrong: TE 69.5 Q1 2026 quarterly; we have INSEE annual via Melodi DD_EEC_ANNUEL (2024 = 68.8 latest). Searched pynsee CHOMAGE-TRIM-NATIONAL (no employment-rate, only unemployment), pynsee EMPLOI-BIT-TRIM CTTE15 IDBANK 001688428 (SERIE_ARRETEE=TRUE, last 2019), tried Melodi DD_EEC_TRIM/DD_EEC_TRIMESTRIEL/EMPLOI_BIT_*/DD_EEC — all 404. 5+ variants tried.
employment-rate.flag: vintage-frequency-gap: INSEE quarterly employment-rate published in INSEE Informations Rapides but no machine-readable API (BDM CTTE15 discontinued post-2019, new quarterly series not in pynsee or Melodi). Annual Melodi value is correct for 2024. Eurostat lfsi_emp_q has FR Y15-64 quarterly but would label source eurostat not INSEE — violates TE-source-conformity.

energy-inflation.flag: frontend-only: DB stores energy CPI index (113.3); TE shows YoY %change (+14.3%). YoY = (113.3 / 99.13 - 1) * 100 ≈ 14.3%.

exports.te_label: Ministère de l'Économie et des Finances
exports.fix_summary: Switched from quarterly CNT P6 (Q1 value ~248 Bn EUR) to monthly COM-EXT sum of zones Z7712+Z7711+Z6600 (E indicator, CVS-CJO). March 2026 = 51.567 Bn EUR vs TE 52.5 Bn EUR (~98% match). COM-EXT is INSEE-hosted DGDDI customs data; TE label maps to 'Ministère de l'Économie' = lekiosque.finances.gouv.fr which republishes DGDDI. Source code stays 'insee' as data is fetched from INSEE BDM.
exports.flag: value-tolerance: ~1 Bn diff from TE — TE may include additional adjustments (gold trade, services, FAB/CAF). 98% match acceptable.

food-inflation.flag: frontend-only: DB stores food CPI index (101.07); TE shows YoY %change (+1.2%) — note TE description has stale '1.20%' YoY while still labelled 15.90 in older period. Frontend computes YoY.

gdp.flag: vintage-tolerance: 3160.44 vs 3162.08 — 0.05% diff likely from WB API revision after TE last sync.

gdp-per-capita.flag: vintage-tolerance: 39683 vs 39441 — 0.6% diff, WB API revision; TE may not have refreshed.

gdp-real.flag: frontend-only: DB stores GDP volume (662.981 Bn EUR chained); TE label 'GDP Annual Growth Rate' shows YoY % (+1.1%). Frontend computes YoY from level.

government-debt.fix_summary: Switched eurostat gov_10dd_edpt1 -> insee DETTE-TRIM-APU-2020 IDBANK 010777608 (Quarterly Maastricht debt for General Government, % of GDP). Q4 2025 = 115.6% exact TE match. Slug semantics: 'government-debt' = % of GDP (indicator.name = 'Government Debt to GDP'). TE description headline value 3460.5 is actually for sibling slug government-debt-total.

government-debt-total.fix_summary: Switched eurostat gov_10dd_edpt1 -> insee DETTE-TRIM-APU-2020 IDBANK 010777616 (Quarterly Maastricht debt for General Government, EUR Billion). Q4 2025 = 3460.5 EUR Bn exact TE match. Slug semantics: 'government-debt-total' = absolute debt (indicator.name = 'Government Debt'). TE description headline value 115.60 is actually for sibling slug government-debt (% of GDP).
government-debt-total.flag: slug-naming: 'government-debt-total' is the absolute number (3460.5 Bn EUR), TE displays it on 'government-debt' page. The current naming swaps the two — frontend uses 'government-debt-total' for the absolute amount, 'government-debt' for % of GDP.

government-spending.flag: unit-display: DB stores 169.979 Bn EUR; TE shows 169953 EUR Million. Same number, frontend should display in EUR Million for parity with TE.

government-spending-eur.flag: no-te-page: 'government-spending-eur' has no proper TE indicator page (TE returns generic 'Trading Economics' shell with no description). This slug is a duplicate of 'government-spending'. Current eurostat namq_10_gdp P3_S13 (Total general government final consumption expenditure incl. social transfers in kind = 184.1 Bn EUR) is a different concept than the insee chained-volume P3 S0 government-spending (169.979 Bn EUR). Recommend deprecating slug or restricting to non-FR countries.

gross-fixed-capital-formation.fix_summary: Switched VALORISATION V (nominal current price, 166.315 Bn EUR Q1 2026) -> L (chained-volume, 142.928 Bn EUR) to match TE's published EUR Million figure (142928). IDBANK changed from 011794879 to 011794884.

imports.te_label: Ministère de l'Économie et des Finances
imports.fix_summary: Switched from quarterly CNT P7 (~252 Bn) to monthly COM-EXT sum of zones Z7712+Z7711+Z6600 (I indicator, CVS-CJO). March 2026 = 61.763 Bn EUR vs TE 59.3 Bn EUR (~96% match). COM-EXT is INSEE-hosted DGDDI customs data; TE label maps to 'Ministère de l'Économie' = lekiosque.finances.gouv.fr which republishes DGDDI.
imports.flag: value-tolerance: 2.5 Bn diff from TE — TE may apply CIF/FOB adjustment, gold/silver classification, or different territory aggregation. 96% match acceptable; exact alignment would require direct lekiosque scrape.

industrial-production.flag: frontend-only: DB stores IPI index (102.0); TE shows YoY % (+0.9%). Frontend computes YoY. Note: data is 1 month behind TE (Feb vs Mar) — INSEE BDM release lag.

inflation-cpi.flag: frontend-only: DB stores CPI index (102.26); TE shows YoY % (+2.2%).

interest-rate.flag: data-staleness: DB last point 2025-06-11 with value 2.15 (ECB main refinancing rate). TE description doesn't quote a current value — only historical average + all-time-high 4.75 (2000). Source is correct; current 2.15 matches ECB June 2025 cut.

job-vacancies.flag: real-gap: TE shows DARES monthly absolute count (295.2 thousand postes vacants); our eurostat JVR is the job vacancy rate (2.3%) — both wrong source AND wrong concept. DARES publishes the absolute series via STMT survey but no public API; data is on dares.travail-emploi.gouv.fr as quarterly Excel/CSV downloads. INSEE BDM has no DARES vacancies dataset. Would require DARES STMT scrape (5+ URL variants tried: dares.travail-emploi.gouv.fr/donnees/emplois-vacants, pole-emploi.org open data, data.gouv.fr). Defer to dedicated DARES provider.

labor-force-participation-rate.fix_summary: Switched from annual DD_EEC_ANNUEL Melodi (ACTRATE _T Y15T64 = 74.4 in 2024) to quarterly EMPLOI-BIT-TRIM CTTA15 (Activity rate, 15-64, both sexes, REF_AREA=FR-D976 'France excluding Mayotte' = national, CVS). Q1 2026 = 75.6 exact TE match.

labour-costs.flag: source-label-mismatch: TE attributes to ECB; our data from INSEE ICT-2020 (CH BTN coût horaire). Values are within 0.3 points (114.1 vs 113.8). ECB SDW LCI dataflow not directly callable (no public LCI endpoint at data-api.ecb.europa.eu, no DBnomics mirror). The underlying source for ECB's LCI is Eurostat lc_lci_r2_q. Both Eurostat and INSEE publish closely-aligned labour cost indices for France. 5+ variants tried (data-api.ecb LCI keys, sdw-wsrest, DBnomics ECB/LCI, Eurostat lc_lci_r2_q FR B-S I20 NSA). Accept INSEE ICT as 'close enough'; the source-label difference is methodology naming rather than data origin.

long-term-unemployment-rate.fix_summary: INSEE BDM TXCHLODU/CHLODU series discontinued 2019. Eurostat une_ltu_q value matches TE (1.8). Eurostat is the authoritative live source; TE label INSEE is misleading.

manufacturing-production.fix_summary: INSEE IPI-2021 NAF2=A10-CZ Index = 105 Mar 2026 (YoY ~+1.6% per TE). Source and concept match.

medical-doctors.fix_summary: Deleted stale 2022 DB rows (3.4); yaml already had 2021=3.36 matching TE.

minimum-wages.fix_summary: Updated curated yaml from 1801.8 (SMIC Jan 2026) to 1823 (Eurostat earn_mw_cur 2026-S1 = TE value). Source still curated since Eurostat semester period parsing is not implemented; value matches Eurostat exactly.

mining-production.fix_summary: INSEE IPI-2021 NAF2=A21-B (Industries extractives) Index = 74.11 Mar 2026, YoY direction matches TE -5.7%.

nurses.fix_summary: Deleted stale 2022 DB rows (11.8); yaml already had 2021=9.64 matching TE.

personal-income-tax-rate.fix_summary: DGFiP top marginal rate 45% matches TE. Curated source acceptable for tax constants.

population.fix_summary: Switched from worldbank (68.88) to INSEE BDM POPULATION-STRUCTURE 001641586 (Population totale au 1er janv, FR=FE incl. Mayotte). 2026 = 69.082M matches TE 69.1M. WB marked inactive, INSEE is new default.

ppi.fix_summary: Source matches (INSEE IPPI). Value differs because TE uses base 2015=100 (~126), we use INSEE's current base 2021=100 (115.4). IPPI-2015 was discontinued Aug 2020, cannot be chained directly. Multiple alternate aggregates tested (BC00, BCD0, BCXA, NA_A10-BE/CZ, MIG_NRG, EXT_IPP, FR_PM_IPP); none yield 126.1 in base 2021. Direction (YoY +0.2%) matches TE.

productivity.fix_summary: Switched series from RLPR_HW (Real Labour Prod per Hour Worked, Index 2020) to RLPR_PER (per Person Employed, Index 2015=100, SCA). Q1 2026 = 101.41 matches TE exactly. Hour-based series didn't have Q1 2026 data yet.

retail-sales.fix_summary: TE labels source as Banque de France but BdF/STS DBnomics retail series ends 2024-08, only INSEE ICA-2021-COMMERCE is current. INSEE NAF=47 Index 107.2 Mar 2026, computed MoM = +0.19% vs TE +0.40% (slight seasonal-adjustment difference). Best available current French retail data is INSEE.

retirement-age-men.te_label: Ministère des Solidarités et de la Santé
retirement-age-men.fix_summary: Updated curated yaml from 64 to 63 (TE shows 63 in transition phase of 2023 reform, full 64 by 2030).

retirement-age-women.te_label: Ministère des Solidarités et de la Santé
retirement-age-women.fix_summary: Updated curated yaml from 64 to 63 (same as men).

sales-tax-rate.fix_summary: France VAT standard rate 20% matches TE.

services-inflation.fix_summary: INSEE IPC-2025 PRIX_CONSO=4009 Services Index 102.16 Apr 2026 (YoY ~+1.8% matches TE). Frontend computes YoY %.

social-security-rate.te_label: Ministère des Solidarités et de la Santé
social-security-rate.fix_summary: Updated curated yaml from 67.4 (45+22.4) to 68 (TE value 45+23).

social-security-rate-companies.te_label: Ministère des Solidarités et de la Santé

social-security-rate-employees.te_label: Ministère des Solidarités et de la Santé
social-security-rate-employees.fix_summary: Updated curated yaml from 22.4 to 23 (TE value).

terrorism-index.fix_summary: Updated curated yaml from 4.8 to 3.22 (GTI 2025 IEP TE value).

unemployed-persons.fix_summary: Conceptual gap: TE shows DARES Cat A registered job seekers (Pôle Emploi/France Travail) ~3109k. Our INSEE/Eurostat data is ILO LFS unemployment ~2439k — these measure different things. Tried INSEE BDM DEMANDES-EMPLOIS-NATIONALES (DEMANDEURS_EMPLOI_PE_A only has regional, not FE-total; DEMANDEURS_EMPLOI_PE A-B-C combined series 001572363 ended 2018-12; DEFM_MOYENNE_TRIMESTRIELLE has no FE-total). DBnomics DARES provider only exposes intérimaires (temp workers). DARES data not exposed via INSEE BDM or DBnomics. Truth.yaml updated with note. 5+ variants tried.

unemployment.fix_summary: Source matches (INSEE BIT). Value 7.7 vs TE 8.1 — INSEE latest published Q4 2025 = 7.7; our Q1 2026 = 7.7 may be carried forward, or TE has a later revision. Tried all national age/sex variants (00-, 00-24, 25-49, 50-, 15-64); only 00- gives full population; values 5.0/7.0/4.9 for sub-segments don't match 8.1. France métropolitaine vs France entière (incl. DOM) tested: only FM available. Likely TE has Q1 2026 INSEE revision we haven't refetched.

youth-unemployment-rate.fix_summary: Switched is_default from insee (Melodi annual UNEMPRATE Y15T24) to eurostat (une_rt_m monthly Y_LT25 SA). March 2026 = 20.5% matches TE exactly. truth.yaml + FR.yaml inventory updated.
